query: I just finished writing a new skill. How do I test it before shipping?
I want to make sure my skill still works after I refactor it. what's the right approach?
my skill loads for the wrong queries — how do I diagnose and fix the triggering?
here's my evals.json — can you run it and tell me if my skill passes?
I need a baseline for my pdf skill before I start making changes
how do I measure whether a skill improvement actually made things better?
help me write test cases for my recipe-helper skill, both for triggering and output quality
my skill never loads when users ask about meal planning even though the SKILL.md covers it. help
I want to run evals on my skill and get a report showing pass rates
what's the TDD approach for iterating on a skill?
write unit tests for my Python data pipeline module
how do I test my MCP server's tool responses end to end?
help me set up pytest for my new Python package
I want to evaluate the quality of this essay draft
how do I run integration tests in my CI/CD pipeline?
can you review my code and tell me if there are any bugs?
I need to benchmark the performance of my SQL queries
how do I test a REST API with curl?
help me write a test plan for my mobile app
I want to check if my prompt template produces good outputs — can you evaluate a few examples?
